title: Talk To Me (2023)
description: Talk To Me follows the life of a man who invents a device that allows him to communicate with digital devices, crossing the boundary between humans and machines. As he becomes more engrossed in technology, he starts neglecting his personal relationships. The movie also deals with themes such as the implications of technology, sacrifice, and the importance of human connection.

The barber suffers from amnesia due to war but is mistaken for the dictator. The film culminates in a powerful speech about humanity, breaking the persona of the dictator.

However, after finally capturing his first dragon, he finds that he no longer wants to kill it and instead befriends the creature, who he names Toothless. Together, they embark on an adventure that will change both their lives and their village forever.

title: Psycho
description: Psycho is a classic horror thriller by Alfred Hitchcock, which tells the story of Marion Crane, a secretary who steals $40,000 from her employer. She ends up at the Bates Motel, run by the strange Norman Bates and his controlling mother. After Marion is murdered in a shocking shower scene, her sister Lila and boyfriend Sam Loomis investigate, unveiling Norman's chilling secret.

description: 'Singin' in the Rain' is a comedy-musical that tells the story of the transition from silent movies to talkies. It focuses on a successful on-screen pair, Don Lockwood and Lina Lamont, whose careers are threatened by Lina's comically awful voice. Meanwhile, Don falls for Kathy Selden, a talented actress, and singer, who dubs for Lina to save their film, but later gets the recognition she deserves. The iconic song and dance sequence in the rain is a highlight of the movie.

description: Set in post-war Tokyo, Ikiru tells the story of Kanji Watanabe, a longtime bureaucrat who, after learning he has terminal stomach cancer, tries to find meaning in his life. Realising he's lived his life without any real meaning, he looks for ways to leave a beneficial mark, and decides to help transform a city slum into a children's playground.

title: Into The Wild
description: Into the Wild tells the story of a young man, Christopher McCandless who ditches his materialistic lifestyle after graduating as top student and athlete from Emory University. He donates his college fund to charity, destroys all identification, and embarks on a cross-country journey to live alone in the wilderness of Alaska. Facing severe challenges and personal growth, his journey becomes a reflection of self-discovery and the fierce appeal of nature. It is a story of survival, exploration, and the indomitable human spirit.

Terry, initially hesitant to stand up against the corruption, is challenged by a strong-willed local priest and Edie, the sister of a murdered dockworker. Spurred by a newfound conscience, Terry becomes a witness for the Waterfront Crime Commission against the Union Boss, paving the way for justice.

The movie offers a dramatized version of MozartвҖҷs life filled with triumphs, failures, and a heart-wrenching end. Despite Salieri's complex feelings of jealousy and admiration towards Mozart, he ultimately takes a step toward his own downfall in orchestrating Mozart's demise by indulging in deceit and manipulation.

description: Fanny and Alexander is a sweeping family saga by Ingmar Bergman. Set in early 20th-century Sweden, the film follows the lives of the wealthy Ekdahl family, predominantly through the eyes of siblings Fanny and Alexander. The death of the siblings' father drastically changes their lives as their mother goes on to marry a strict bishop. The children's world of comfort and creativity clashes with the bishop's harsh and ascetic lifestyle.
